Maria sat alone in her dark cell. She felt lost and scared. Her days were long and empty. Drugs had taken everything from her: her family, her friends, her dreams. She cried every night, wishing for a way out. One day, a kind guard gave her a book about hope. As she read, a spark lit inside her. Maybe she could change. Maybe there was still a chance for a new life. Maria took a deep breath. This was her moment to fight back.
